query:
SELECT 'locations' as tbl, businessOwnerId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM locations GROUP BY businessOwnerId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'clients', businessOwnerId, COUNT(*) FROM clients GROUP BY businessOwnerId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'appointments', businessOwnerId, COUNT(*) FROM appointments GROUP BY businessOwnerId
ORDER BY tbl, businessOwnerId;
